reviews.review_heading: The experience I had at my college.
reviews.review_text: The facility of classroom is good. But the Wi-Fi facility is not there. In the labs, there are few working computers. Mostly computers are not working. The facilities in our hostel are 3 MEM per room. Each has bed, beeruva, and study chair. The quality of food in mess is poor. In canteen, food is average.

reviews.review_heading: My college review with good infrastructure and placements in the past few years.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure but there is a problem with Wi-Fi and fans in our classrooms. Library is also very peaceful place to study. The quality of facilities in our hostel is not good. There is good food available in canteen and mess. There is no problem with food. There is a medical college beside the college. We don't have any problem with medical. There is a very big open ground to play games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very well-equipped classrooms and labs. We have digital classrooms and library. Our labs have high internet connectivity. Our college infrastructure is very good. We have separate hostel blocks for boys and girls. Boys hostel can accommodate over 500 students. Girls hostel block can accommodate over 300 students. The food is very hygienic. We have a seperate sports club in our college. We have all the facilities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with placements and infrastructure but completely dissatisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Library is the best part of our college, it consists of maximum useful books. Hostel also provides good enough security, storage, and good food. It provides 24-hour security for ladies, attached gym, playground, and library. Canteen is shut down most of the time.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JB Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text:
In our department there are labs, work shops, library, sports, CRT classes, smart classes, etc.
In our hostel, they provide good food and there are also Wi-Fi facilities. Rooms and washrooms are well maintained and there are enough beds and blankets .

reviews.review_heading: The college life I expected before coming here is becoming a reality.
reviews.review_text: Our college has decent infrastructure with separate blocks for different branches. It provides facilities like labs; each branch has its own lab, and every department has a separate department library. The classrooms are nice, equipped with projectors that help students and faculty explain and understand easily.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for our better future.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are very good in our college. The hostel is good. We have Wi-Fi in our classrooms. We have a great library with a wide range of books. The quality of the food is very good. The hostel provides non-vegetarian food items twice a week.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, but it is losing its reputation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the computer science and engineering course was good. We had a decent computer lab where PCs were in good condition. We didn't have Wi-Fi in the lab. In the boys' hostel, we did not have good hostel facilities. There was no Wi-Fi available on campus. The quality of the food served was not good. The water supply was for only 20 minutes in the morning and evening.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers are well-qualified, experienced and have good skills.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. There is a high-speed Wi-Fi connection. The labs have many facilities with good infrastructure. The classrooms are very good with digital classes. Our library is huge. There are many sports and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very huge and the campus is green and clean.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in our college. There is high-speed internet Wi-Fi connection. Labs have many facilities with good infrastructure. Classrooms are very good with digital classes. Our library is very huge. There are many facilities like sports and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's good to study in this institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, as the labs and classrooms are spacious and have all the facilities. Our hostel is very spacious with Wi-Fi connectivity. The food provided is hygienic and tasty, like home food. There is a huge ground on our campus to play.

reviews.review_heading: Our college crowd was very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure was very beautiful and good. All the classrooms were modern, and our college provided very good library facility and Wi-Fi facility. Our college canteen was good and served healthy and fresh food. Quality of food was also very good.

reviews.review_heading: The college had excellent teachers for 2014 to 2018 batch but not for 1st-year students.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are two big cricket grounds and a good basketball court. College interior was good and mainly mechanical, CSE and ECE block was good as compared to other branches blocks. The college hostel is neat, but there is a water problem. Food served is also average. The college canteen was the best to hangout. Everything is available in our college, like food, books, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Currently dissatisfied because of the placements but the faculty and facilities are good!
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi connessione is not table and the infrastructure of the classes needs to be improved. The library is very spacious and peaceful. The hostel is very good as it is newly renovated and the food facilities are also excellent. The food in the college canteen is also very good in terms of quality.

reviews.review_heading: I was fully satisfied with our college facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Though our college is constructed long back in the year 1997. The hostel facilities are not well furnished but now they constructed new hostel which has all facilities needed by the students 
 and they provide homely food,wifi facility,hot water,Ac,etc..

overview_faqs.question: Is Gokula Krishna College of Engineering good?
overview_faqs.answer: Gokula Krishna College of Engineering (GKCE) is an institution that has strong prestige in relation to engineering education. The leading and academic center, with an excellent structure, is well-equipped in handing out diverse kinds of undergraduate and postgraduate courses that offer a balance of theoretical knowledge along with practical application. Experienced faculty members are present who are interested in the development of students as well as research activities. Besides offering a motivating learning environment, GKCE also has a proactive placement cell that offers internships and job placement with leading companies across the country in almost all sectors. The institute possesses a spectrum of extracurricular activities and facilities, which provide an all-round approach to an education experience. Therefore, this college would be a good choice for the students who want to become engineers.

Smart classrooms are also available. Quality of the food served in the hostel mess is average. There is a canteen on the campus in which all the stationery items are also available. Medical facilities are not available. It conducts sports and games once a year.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not worthy to join because of its management and faculty.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility on the campus. Classrooms are not well furnished. Even the lab equipment doesn't work properly. The college doesn't conduct any games. If students are willing to play games presenting our college, the authority will not even allow them to do so. Food served in the canteen and mess doesn't have any quality. In the name of free hostel facility, they are attracting middle-class people to join this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gokula Krishna College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Gokula Krishna College of Engineering is good, but the maintenance was not good. There are three separate blocks for engineering, diploma, and pharmacy, but the diploma block is closed due to the lack of students in that course.

reviews.review_heading: No please. Don't get fooled by seeing the building.
reviews.review_text: 2/5 for infrastructure. The facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games etc. Were very poor. Labs have zero quality. Classrooms are okay. Labs are very important for mechanical engineering stream, but the management never bothered about that. Canteen is below par. Hostel is below average.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to enjoy u have to join in any college but you have to succeed in your life you hope for
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure is good but the labs for all branches are not good. There are no digital classrooms, the sports were conducted once in 2 or 3 years and there is no scope for sports in this college. The classrooms were just good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi connection is mainly in the labs and for the department HODs. There is no Wi-Fi connection in classrooms. There is a vast library with 25000 volumes of books but there are no medical facilities in the college. Sports are conducted for yearly once and there will be a grand celebration for a day. The food in the canteen also good.

It’s a nice college with all the lab facilities and faculty. Less curricular activities, more of teaching and classes. Practical experience is not exist. I mean more of bookish knowledge. Faculty is interactive. Don't expect any placements. Surrounding environment is good with full of farms. It’s a nice college with all the lab facilities and faculty. Less curricular activities, more of teaching and classes. Practical experience is not exist. I mean more of bookish knowledge. Faculty is interactive. Don't expect any placements. Surrounding environment is good with full of farms.

reviews.review_heading: It is decent, but there are better colleges than it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the worst canteen. I have seen one small cockroach in my food. I said to the management, and they said, the food lid has been open for a long time, so the cockroach came. The college provides the best playing kits to students, which is very encouraging.

reviews.review_heading: In my batch, only a few members got placed, so that was the satisfaction.
reviews.review_text: The hostel building was nice with tasty food. Wi-Fi, hot water, beds were available. Rooms were clean. The warden was very strict. We had taken permission from the warden to go outside for needed goods.

reviews.review_heading: College is satisfactory in terms of fees and infrastructure, placement and industry exposure is poor
reviews.review_text:
We are having Wi-Fi facilities with limited speed and we have good spacial labs as well as classes. we are having pretty good library but we cannot find the international author books.
Medical facilities are good, if any thing goes wrong we are carried by a mini van to hospital, sports, games are happened according to the requirements of students and holidays, quality of food is moderate, hostel rooms are good, there is no infrastructure problem in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure. facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. In our college there is no wi-fi. There is a no medical facilities and senior faculty members. In our college there is a no pet sir and sports hour no ground there is no good quality of labs. Our college has big classrooms and hostel food is below average.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college to fulfill your future dreams.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college provides good facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a hostel, etc. The food served in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best and I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided the best hostel. All the classrooms were fully air-conditioned with projectors installed. seating was also the best. Labs were available and we had the largest library in our college. There was a huge playground, plants, etc. All the classrooms were Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: It's the worst college I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the worst infrastructure. Even the classrooms are not good. Classrooms are in bad condition. The campus doesn't look good. There are no boundaries at some of the area in the college. Overall the infrastructure is not good.

reviews.review_heading: If you are good at studying and belong to a very poor family,  you can study at a very low price.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. Sports tho bhull hi jaooo. Medical facilities are average as we have a first-aid kit only, which is found in everyone's car. Classrooms are similar to the government school classrooms. The food (canteen) has no taste on food. Only hostel students eat there. The hostel is too far away from the college.

reviews.review_heading: The RITM is good because of faculty, facilities and lifetime support.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about the infrastructure, there are better buildings and playgrounds. The classrooms are very well-maintained and cleaned. I completed B.Tech, CSE, the computer science labs and classrooms are very well-maintained and always be in working support.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a great college.
reviews.review_text: It has 5 buildings, for computer science engineering, civil, mechanical engineering, electrical engineering and the last one is MBA department. It has wheel equipped labs, classrooms, library and a high-speed Wi-Fi also.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are totally old, and it is not air-conditioned. There are no good boards, and they use chalk systems with full dust in classrooms, and it does not look better. The building is old. Only a 10% Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. There is no network.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, facilities and well educated staff.
reviews.review_text:
1. Civil Engineering labs are available I. e Surveying lab with instruments, Soil Mechanics Lab, Building material testing Lab etc. All required instruments and lab are available. 
2. I did not use hostel services. Canteen Service good.
A large size open playground is available. 
Bus facility is available.
